seoTitle: Postans vs Preston Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Postans and Preston Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Postans vs Preston Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Postans and Preston Beach.
heading: Postans vs Preston Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Postans, Western Australia and Preston Beach, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Postans has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Preston Beach (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Postans or Preston Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Postans has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Preston Beach scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Postans scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Preston Beach scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Postans or Preston Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Postans has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
